Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Extends certain tuition waivers for police officer students of the city university of New York
Summary: Extends certain tuition waivers for police officer students of the city university of New York to 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT amending chapter 548 of the laws of 2004 amending the education law relating to certain tuition waivers for police officer students of the city university of New York, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
